suggestions_no_self_review_check.name: suggestions_no_self_review_check
suggestions_no_self_review_check.value: "suggestions"."resolved_by" is null or "suggestions"."status" = 'withdrawn' or "suggestions"."resolved_by" is distinct from "suggestions"."author_id"

publish_requests_no_self_review_check.name: publish_requests_no_self_review_check
publish_requests_no_self_review_check.value: "publish_requests"."reviewer_id" is null or "publish_requests"."reviewer_id" is distinct from "publish_requests"."requester_id"
